summary:
# 今日社区动态（MiniMax-M2.7 | 2026-04-26 ~ 2026-04-27）

- 🧠 [Memory](#subsystem-Memory)：DAMON 补丁重提交（LRU 排序/重启/虚拟地址/sysfs-schemes）保持代码最新；virtio balloon 跳过冗余内存清零显著降低 I/O 开销；vmalloc 尾部资源回收优化减少内存碎片
- 🌐 [Networking](#subsystem-Networking)：r8152 驱动新增 TRENDnet TUC-ET2G v2.0 网卡支持扩展兼容性；netdevsim 零初始化 iphdr 防止安全风险；ROSE 协议修复 use-after-free 确保内核对象生命周期安全
- 🛡 [Security](#subsystem-Security)：本周期多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- 📈 [Observability](#subsystem-Observability)：perf record 增强 timerfd 超时退出码处理优雅退出；intel-speed-select 守护进程改进 pidfile 文件锁防止多实例冲突；BPF arena off-by-one 边界验证错误已修复
- 🗂 [Filesystem & Storage](#subsystem-Filesystem%20%26%20Storage)：本周期改动多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- 🏗 [Architecture](#subsystem-Architecture)：RISC-V Sophgo/T-Head 设备树改进扩展硬件支持（DMA 通道/WiFi）；Samsung/Google 固件修复 ACPM 状态管理和 coreboot_table 边界检查/资源清理
- 🔋 [Power Management](#subsystem-Power%20Management)：本周期多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- ⏱ [Clocks & Timers](#subsystem-Clocks%20%26%20Timers)：本周期多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- ⚙ [Core Kernel](#subsystem-Core%20Kernel)：本周期多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低
- 🧩 [Virtualization](#subsystem-Virtualization)：PCIe TSM 可信安全管理器核心模块修复，增强机密计算环境下的安全隔离能力
- 🧰 [Drivers](#subsystem-Drivers)：本周期多为小修正和清理，整体风险较低

## Memory
- `perf` `feature` DAMON 补丁重新提交，包含 LRU 排序、重启、虚拟地址和 sysfs-schemes 等改进，保持非紧急修复代码最新状态 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/527)
- `perf` `feature` virtio balloon 和 VM 跳过冗余内存清零操作，显著降低 I/O 开销提升性能 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/493)
- `perf` `feature` DAMON 新增节点 eligible 内存 bp 目标指标，支持基于 NUMA 节点的内存策略精细控制 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/491)
- `perf` `feature` DAMON 引入数据属性监控功能，让用户可追踪访问模式和数据内容等属性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/458)
- `perf` `feature` vmalloc 大型分配尾部资源回收优化，减少内存碎片化和浪费 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/85)
- `feature` DAMON sysfs-schemes 修复 mem_cgroup_iter_break 遗漏调用，确保内存 cgroup 迭代在错误路径正确释放资源 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/394)
- `feature` madvise 拒绝无效 advice 参数，防止恶意或错误参数导致系统行为异常 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/220)
- `feature` vmalloc 尾部资源回收机制设计，探索大规模内存分配场景下的资源优化 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/84)
- `bugfix` memory_hotplug 修复内存块引用泄漏问题，防止内存热插拔操作后资源未正确释放 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/352)

## Networking
- `feature` Realtek PHY 驱动用符号常量替换魔法数字，提升代码可读性和可维护性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/27/17)
- `feature` r8152 USB 网络驱动添加对 TRENDnet TUC-ET2G v2.0 网卡的支持，扩展设备兼容性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/511)
- `feature` netdevsim 零初始化 struct iphdr，避免未初始化数据的潜在安全问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/443)
- `feature` mt76 mt7925 WiFi 驱动在探测失败时正确清理 DMA 资源，防止资源泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/343)
- `feature` lan966x 以太网驱动避免在注册失败时注销 netdev，简化错误处理流程 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/337)
- `bugfix` ROSE 协议修复 use-after-free 和引用计数 bug，确保内核对象生命周期安全 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/347)
- `bugfix` ep93xx 以太网驱动修复探测错误时的回滚处理，保证初始化失败时资源正确释放 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/327)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/27/17)

## Security
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/532)

## Observability
- `perf` `feature` 增强 perf record 工具的 timerfd 超时退出码处理机制，使性能数据采集在超时场景下能更优雅地退出并返回正确的错误码，避免资源泄漏和状态不一致问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/408)
- `perf` `feature` 强化 intel-speed-select 守护进程的 pidfile 文件锁机制，通过改进文件锁逻辑提升 daemon 在并发场景下的可靠性和稳定性，防止多实例启动导致的冲突 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/362)
- `feature` 扩展 LKDTM（Linux Kernel Driver Test）模块，新增 folio_lock 死锁场景测试用例，增强内核锁机制的可测试性和调试能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/361)
- `bugfix` 修复 BPF arena 方向的 off-by-one 边界验证错误，v2 版本完善了内存访问边界检查逻辑，防止越界访问导致的安全风险和潜在的 kernel panic [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/27/5)
- `bugfix` BPF arena off-by-one 边界验证问题的 v1 版本补丁，被后续 v2 替代 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/27/1)

## Filesystem & Storage
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/420) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/18) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/172) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/171) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/71) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/10) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/149)

## Architecture
- `feature` riscv: dts: sophgo: cv180x: Allow the DMA multiplexer to use more channels by updating device tree definitions, enabling better hardware resource utilization for Sophgo CV180x SoCs [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/52)
- `feature` riscv: dts: thead: Enable WiFi functionality on Lichee Pi 4A board by adding necessary device tree nodes for the T-Head TH1520 based platform, expanding hardware support for this RISC-V development board [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/92)
- `feature` firmware: samsung: Fix stale response flag handling in acpm_prepare by correcting state management logic in Exynos ACPM driver, preventing potential communication issues with Samsung SoC power management [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/478)
- `feature` firmware: google: Add bounds checking validation in coreboot_table_populate operations to prevent buffer overflow vulnerabilities when parsing Coreboot table entries on Google Chromebooks [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/503)
- `bugfix` riscv: dts: sophgo: Fix incorrect CPU unit addresses in device tree files for SG2042 and SG2044 platforms, resolving DT schema validation errors that could cause boot issues on Sophgo hardware [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/53)
- `bugfix` firmware: google: Fix orphaned device handling during partial populate scenarios in coreboot_table driver, ensuring proper cleanup of hardware resources when initialization fails mid-process on Google platforms [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/27/15)

## Power Management
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/374)

## Clocks & Timers
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/395)

## Core Kernel
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/378)

## Virtualization
- `bugfix` 修复 PCIe TSM（可信安全管理器）核心模块在 drivers/virt/coco/tsm-core.c 中的问题，增强机密计算环境下的安全隔离能力，该更新对 7.1 内核版本的虚拟化安全基础设施至关重要 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/375)

## Drivers
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/426) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/26/208)

## Other
共43个补丁，主要涉及drivers/staging、drivers/media、drivers/mailbox、drivers/accel、drivers/platform、drivers/crypto等驱动目录的修改。
Unmatched by fixed subsystem rules: 43 items. Consider extending directory rules to improve classification.
标签统计：`feature` 19 / `bugfix` 13 / `other` 11 / `perf` 0。
